prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次持续前移（竞争加剧）、2026年招生计划持平、学                         校排名持续上升且优势学科突出、抖音热度较高等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次在2025年基准1027名基础上继续小幅前移；同时考虑重庆物理类考生总数略有减少对竞争的缓                        解作用，修正幅度控制在合理范围内。预测最低位次约977名，区间860–1094名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 1660 → 1509 → 1230 → 1162 → 1027, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 633 positions over the past 5 years, indicating intensifying competition; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 1027; the enrollment plan for this university in Chongqing Physics Category was 83 in 2021, 82 in 2022, 82 in 2023, 79 in 2024, and 79 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 79, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. Its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been rising in recent years: 19th in 2021 → 18th in 2022 → 16th in 2023 → 14th in 2024 → 13th in 2025 → 14th in 2026, firmly among the top-tier science and engineering universities in China; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is slightly negative, mainly involving teacher ethics and school management incidents, but the university's public response has been relatively efficient; Douyin popularity is relatively high (overall ranking 47th, comprehensive popularity about 838,000), with short video exposure at an upper-middle level, reflecting high application interest; historical abnormal admission records show no obvious gap signals for Beijing Institute of Technology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering, Control Science and Engineering received A+, Optical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology received A, Mechanics, Mathematics, Physics, Chemical Engineering and Technology, Business Administration received A-, totaling 12 disciplines rated A- or above, demonstrating strong strength and high alignment with Physics Category admission majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, consistent with BIT's advantageous engineering fields, with high application enthusiasm for related majors; the number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing increased from 98,954 in 2021 to 139,478 in 2025, with total examinees in 2026 about 209,000, estimated at about 136,900 based on the recent Physics Category proportion of about 65.5%, slightly lower than the 139,500 in 2025, indicating a slight easing of competition; Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, and Chongqing is not a local province; the university's national enrollment mainly focuses on Jiangsu, Shandong, Guangdong, etc., with Chongqing's enrollment share about 2%-3%, at a medium-low level, so regional preference factors have limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in historical rankings (intensifying competition), unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, rising university rankings with outstanding disciplines, and high Douyin popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will continue to move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 1027; also taking into account the slight decrease in the total number of Physics Category examinees in Chongqing, which eases competition, the adjustment range is kept reasonable. The predicted minimum ranking is about 977, with a range of 860–1094.

For rankings significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 860), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 862 → 858 → 819 → 977 → 830, showing significant fluctuations, with a drop to 977 in 2024 and a recovery to 830 in 2025; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 830. The enrollment plan for History Category in Chongqing was 18 in 2021, 12 in 2022, 13 in 2023, 22 in 2024, and 17 in 2025; the 2026 plan remains at 17, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing Institute of Technology is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university, consistently ranked among the top 20 nationally in the Soft Science Ranking (14th in 2026), with top-tier comprehensive strength; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, but mainly related to science and engineering incidents, with limited impact on History Category applications; Douyin popularity is high, reflecting overall high attention; no obvious admission gaps; strong disciplines in Management Science and Engineering (A) and Business Administration (A-), matching the History Category's Social Science Experimental Class (Management and Economics direction).

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors like Law, Chinese Language/Literature are trending from hot to divergent observation, while Management and Economics are in divergent observation; the number of History Category examinees in Chongqing decreased from 82,738 in 2021 to 73,373 in 2025, with a fluctuating downward trend; estimated at about 72,100 in 2026 based on a History Category proportion of approximately 34.5%, slightly lower than 73,400 in 2025, easing competition slightly; Beijing Institute of Technology is located in Beijing, and Chongqing is not a local source province, with a small History Category enrollment (17), so regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the large fluctuations in historical rankings but the recovery to 830 in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, and a slight decrease in the total number of History Category examinees, it is expected that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be slightly higher than the 2025 baseline of 830 (competition slightly easing). The predicted minimum ranking is about 822, with a range of 722–922.
